description.value:
A heavy iron bar fitted with flanges, capable of crushing blows as well as tearing cuts. Favored by warriors who want a weapon that can crack armor and break bones alike.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Melee d6, Bludgeoning
BasicOne-Handed, Melee d8, Bludgeoning or Slashing or Piercing, Disarm
MasterOne-Handed, Melee d8, Bludgeoning or Slashing or Piercing, Disarm, Powerful Blow
Master PerkPowerful Blow: deals STR modifier bonus damage and the target has disadvantage on attack rolls; the target makes a CON save to end the effect.

rmeData.masterPerk: Powerful Blow deals STR modifier bonus damage and the target has disadvantage on attack rolls until they succeed on a CON save to end the effect.
